start_assessment.short: To start an assessment, open Assessment List or Create Assessment.
steps: If no active assessment exists, create a new assessment.
Activate applicable departments.
Fill assessor information.
Open Checklist and start checkpoint entry.
If you are an external assessor, first open Assigned Facilities and select the mapped facility.

checklist_help.short: Checklist is completed checkpoint by checkpoint for selected department and area of concern.
steps: Select department.
Select area of concern.
Select subtype.
Select assessment method if available.
Enter score 0, 1 or 2.
Click Save & Next.
notes: If some checkpoints are already saved, checklist should continue from the first pending checkpoint.

cqi_help.short: CQI starts from gaps found during checklist scoring.
steps: Open Gap Analysis to review non-compliant and partial checkpoints.
Open Action Plan to add facility action, responsible post/person and target date.
Open Gap Closure after action completion.
Add closure remarks, revised score and optional evidence where available.

performance_help.short: KPI and Outcome pages capture monthly performance indicators.
steps: Select KPI or Outcome page.
Select activated department and month.
Enter numerator, denominator, result and remarks.
Use Save & Next to complete remaining indicators.
Use Trend page to review month-wise chart and Excel reports.

certification_help.short: Certification tracks State and National certification status for facilities.
steps: Open Manage Certification or Certification Status.
Select certification status, type, date, validity and score.
National certification should be entered only after State certification exists.
Use Certification History to review previous records.

accessibility_help.short: Use Accessibility controls to change text size or enable screen reader support.
steps: Use A-- to reduce text size.
Use A for normal text size.
Use A+ or A++ to increase text size.
Use Screen reader mode to announce pages automatically.
Use Read page to hear the current page.
Use Stop to stop speech.

report_help.short: Reports are available from Report Dashboard and module-specific report buttons.
steps: Use Score Report for checklist scorecard.
Use Progress Report for checkpoint, action plan and revised score details.
Use KPI/Outcome report buttons from performance trend pages.
State Reports provide scoped downloads for state, division, district and block users.

facility_report_lookup.short: I can show a facility summary when the facility is inside your assigned scope.

current_month_status.short: I can show current month assessment, KPI, Outcome and CQI status for your assigned monitoring scope.

pending_cqi_status.short: I can show action plan and gap closure pending counts for your assigned monitoring scope.

fallback.short: I could not match this question with a current SaQshi help topic. I can help with assessment, checklist scoring, CQI gap/action/closure, KPI and Outcome entry, reports, certification, accessibility and monitoring workflows. Please mention the page, facility or task you are working on.
